name: Holiday Appetizer Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese and milk until smooth.
2. Stir in the dried beef, onion, green pepper, and pepper.
3. Mix well.
4. Stir in the sour cream.
5. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch pie plate or small shallow baking dish.
6. Sprinkle with nuts.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
